flags.message: The message doesn't specify anything concrete to match on (no budget, location, size, type, or features). Have a discovery conversation to qualify the lead before sending listings.
Investor lead — prioritize cash flow / cap rate, rentability and condition over lifestyle features. Rental-comp and yield analysis would strengthen the follow-up.

suggested_next_action: Reach out for a short discovery call to qualify the lead: budget, target neighborhoods, size, timeline, and financing. Don't send listings until criteria are clear.
